citations.fact: The official institutional designation is Vishwashanti Gurukul World School.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The 'World School' suffix is a controlled branding measure to distinguish the institution from other MAEER-managed entities and from schools operating under CBSE or other curricula.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The 'World School' designation is a primary indicator of the school's status as a full IB Continuum institution.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)
citations.evidence: primary indicator of IB Continuum status

citations.fact: The school is owned and governed by the Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research (MAEER).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The MAEER Trust registered office is Survey No. 124, Kothrud Paud Road, Ex-Servicemen Colony, Pune-411 038.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The institutional physical address is At. Rajbaug, Loni Kalbhor, District Pune.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The school is located on a 125-acre green campus.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The campus infrastructure supports comprehensive day and residential educational programs.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The school is an International Day and Residential School.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The current Head of School is Dr. Vidhukesh Vimal.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The primary pedagogical framework is the International Baccalaureate (IB).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Sanskrit motto on the official logo is: tejasvinavadhitamastu (Devanagari script on logo).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The campus infrastructure supports 20+ sports disciplines.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a formally authorized IB Continuum School.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: IB Continuum status confirms authority to deliver the full suite of IB programmes across all age groups.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Primary Years Programme (PYP) was originally authorized in April 2009; the certificate was reissued in November 2025.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Middle Years Programme (MYP) was originally authorized in April 2018; the certificate was reissued in November 2025; it is authorized for Years 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Diploma Programme (DP) was originally authorized in May 2006; the certificate was reissued in November 2025.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Career-related Programme (CP) was authorized in October 2025.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: All reissued IB certificates are signed by Olli-Pekka Heinonen, Director General (Geneva).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The Diploma Programme (May 2006) is the earliest IB programme authorized at the school.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The school offers four distinct IB programmes: PYP, MYP, DP, and CP.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The school is authorized for IB for Standard I through Standard XII.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)
citations.evidence: IB for Std. I through Std. XII

citations.fact: Original IB certificates feature a hologram and a watermark for authenticity verification.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The PYP covers the Primary Education Framework.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The DP covers the Pre-university Academic Framework.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The CP covers the Vocational/Career-focused Framework.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The foundational benefits of the IB Continuum are a visionary approach to education and holistic student development.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The institution operates under a No Objection Certificate (NOC) for the IB curriculum issued by the School Education and Sports Department, Government of Maharashtra.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The NOC reference number is NOC-4023/C.R.No.263/SM-3.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: The NOC was issued on January 12, 2024 and expires on January 11, 2027 (valid for three years).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 1: Adherence to Sections 18 and 19 of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education Act, 2009.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 2: Strict adherence to Section 12(1)(C) of the RTE Act, 2009 and Maharashtra RTE Rules 2011 (reserved seats).
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 3: Mandatory integration of 'Divyang' (Special Needs) students in every class, per Resolution No. Mise 2015/(119-A)/SD-6 dated 8th January 2016.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 4: Compliance with all state Educational Acts, Rules, and Policies issued periodically.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 5: Mandatory use of State Board or respective Board curriculum for Standard I to VIII.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 6: Compulsory instruction of the Marathi language as a subject from Standard I to X.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 7: Staff salaries must meet or exceed Schedule 'C' of the Maharashtra Employees of Private Schools (Conditions of Service) Regulation Act, 1981.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 8: Compliance with traffic/safety guidelines and fire protection codes per the National Building Code of India, Part-IV Fire 1997.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 9: Mandatory conduct of 3 tests annually for students up to Standard VIII, with achievement data recorded in the SARAL database.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 10: Regular child-wise data entry into SARAL and U-DISE as demanded by State Authorities.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 11: Compliance with the Maharashtra Educational Institutions (Regulation of Fees) Act, 2011.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 12: Compulsory teaching of Indian History and specifically History related to Maharashtra.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 13: Formation of a Complaint Redressal Committee per the Woman and Child Department government resolution dated 19.6.2014.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 14: The fee structure must be published on the official Government RTE portal.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 15: Compulsory entry of student Aadhar Numbers into the SARAL portal.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 16: The State retains the right to withdraw the NOC at any time without notice for rule deviation.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: NOC Condition 17: Binding requirement to implement CBSE/ICSE/other board syllabi step-by-step if future affiliation is intended.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

citations.fact: Safety compliance follows guidelines from Police, Fire Services, and the Transport Department.
citations.source_document: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)
